name: newworld-harness
description: Harness engineering marketplace — plan validation and debug verification plugins

plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: Automatic plan review plugin — validates plans against project directives and codebase structure. Supports parallel review via subagent or team mode.

plugins.name: debug-verify
plugins.description: Debug verification plugin — validates debugging hypotheses against real data using Advocate + Challenger dual-agent Kapasi Loop.
